name: Steven W.

note: Steven W. is the final authority. Reviews APEX output and all prior findings before issuing institutional sign-off. Diamond projects receive specialist override review.
mandate: Exercise Principal QP authority over the complete analysis. Issue final institutional sign-off. No report released without Steven W. approval.
responsibilities: Principal QP Review — geological and resource estimation under NI 43-101 and JORC Code

sign_off_outcomes.APPROVED: Report released. Verdict confirmed. Buy signal confirmed.
sign_off_outcomes.APPROVED_WITH_CONDITIONS: Report released with additional conditions noted.
sign_off_outcomes.ESCALATED: Specific findings require additional expert review.
sign_off_outcomes.OVERRIDDEN: Steven W. principal QP judgment supersedes APEX verdict. Full reasoning documented.
